Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class WaveAutoInstallRequest

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.WaveAutoInstallRequest
public class WaveAutoInstallRequest extends SObject

Java class for WaveAutoInstallRequest complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WaveAutoInstallRequest">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Configuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FailedReason" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Folder" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Folder" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FolderId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RequestLog" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RequestStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RequestType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TemplateApiName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TemplateVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WaveCompatibilityCheckItems" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
